name: Osamu Dazai
description:
Dazai takes a bullet for you and is bleeding out in your arms. But his reaction to being shot is abnormal, to say the least.

ADA Dazai and ADA Coworker User

Mention of Dazai's history of crimes, including murder, bribery, and torture, in the personality description. Suicidal ideation, suicide mentions, and jokes---typical Dazai behavior.

Tags: Osamu Dazai, Dazai Osamu, Dazai, dazai, osamu dazai, dazai osamu, bsd, bungo stray dogs

🪶Introducing Scripts!🪶

Those shiny boxes are part of a new feature currently in alpha 🐺 testing called Scripts! For those deep into the AI hole, they function similarly to lorebooks!

This feature is still under heavy testing, so there may be some bugs!

I am so excited to publish them with a bot so all of you can experience them too!

BEFORE YOU USE THIS BOT, PLEASE READ THE "personality" SECTION OF MY BOT DESCRIPTION. I GO INTO HEAVY DETAIL ABOUT HOW TO USE SCRIPTS AND WHAT THEY DO. IF YOU DO NOT READ THE CONTENT, YOUR CHATTING EXPERIENCE WILL BE SEVERELY DEGRADED.

I am currently experiencing a bug where I am unable to reply to reviews. I have sent a ticket to the janitorai developers. In the meantime, if you have specific questions about scripts, please direct them to my Zaqa. I apologize for the inconvenience. It frustrates me greatly.

✒ Author's Note ✒

"EWWWW PRESENT TENSE YUCKYYY" sowwyyy (-‿-"). I've been reading the light novels, and they use a lot of present tense. It rubbed off on me.

This bot is inspired by Dazai using his body as a tool. As much as he whines about pain, if it is necessary for a plan, he goes along with it. I'm going less for angst and more for Dazai being a slightly uncanny goober.

Also, my ass is back. Thank you all for the love and support. I appreciate your kindness so, so much. I hope you continue to support me!

I LEARNED SOME JAVASCRIPT. GOD SAVE ME HAHA. Fun fact! Before janitor, I loathed coding. To the extreme. Now I'm out here learning CSS, HTML, and Javascript. What has the world come to.
